Gary Lineker tells Mishal Husain that Donald Trump and FIFA President Gianni Infantino have a "very odd" relationship.

title: SpaceX Options to Begin Trading on Tuesday After IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 期权将于 IPO 后于周二开始交易
summary: Options contracts on Space Exploration Technologies Corp. will begin trading Tuesday after shares began trading on Friday.

title: Czech Rate Hike in June a ‘Real Possibility,’ Governor Says
title_cn: 捷克州长称六月加息“确实有可能”
summary: Czech central bank Governor Ales Michl said he sees a stronger argument to raise interest rates in June to contain inflationary pressures. While the global cost pressures from the energy shock may abate, the Czech economy is also facing domestic risks that may require a tightening of monetary conditions, Michl told Bloomberg News in an interview a week before the rate meeting. “I think a June move now a real possibility" Michl said. “The case for a rate hike has strengthened.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Traders Unwind a $20 Billion Wartime Short in Europe
title_cn: 信贷交易员解除了欧洲 200 亿美元的战时空头
summary: Credit investors have given up their wartime hedges on European companies.

summary: Oil and gas prices tumbled on hopes that the US and Iran are nearing an interim peace deal to end a war that has roiled energy markets, though sticking points remain.

summary: Global investors and retail traders from New York to Tokyo are glued to their screens on Friday waiting for Elon Musk’s SpaceX, the largest initial public offering in history, to start trading.

summary: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff across rocket, satellite and space-linked companies Friday.

title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 认为 SpaceX 的成功机会不到 10%
summary: Elon Musk said he only gave SpaceX a less than 10% chance of succeeding. He spoke from Starbase, Texas via livestream and addressed SpaceX employees. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Exxon Studies Takeover Targets Including Woodside Energy
title_cn: 埃克森美孚研究收购目标，包括伍德赛德能源
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. is studying potential acquisition targets including Australia’s Woodside Energy Group, as the US giant eyes options to deepen its presence in liquefied natural gas and Asian markets, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Gold Declines as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, US Data
title_cn: 交易商权衡伊朗协议前景和美国数据，金价下跌
summary: Gold edged lower as traders weighed prospects for a US-Iran peace deal and data that showed a pickup in US consumer sentiment alongside easing in inflation expectations.

title: Adobe Slips on CFO Departure, Lennar Falls | Stock Movers
title_cn: Adobe 首席财务官离职、Lennar 倒台库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Adobe (ADBE) shares are on the move as the company reports today. It fell in premarket trading on Friday after the software maker said that CFO Dan Durn would be departing the company June 15. The news comes after the CEO announced he would resign earlier this year.

- Lennar (LEN) shares are lower after its forecasts for new orders and deliveries trailed expectations, and as CEO Stuart Miller said the latest quarter was “defined by the same stubborn headwinds that have challenged the housing market for the past several years.” 

- SpaceX (SPCX) shares are pricing as it debuts today on the NASDAQ. Space stocks are up amid the IPO, including Rocket Labs (RKLB), EchoStar (SATS) and Redwire (RDW). (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Consumer Sentiment Rises as Gasoline Prices Ease
title_cn: 随着汽油价格下跌，美国消费者信心上升
summary: US consumer sentiment rose in early June for the first time in four months as the University of Michigan’s preliminary sentiment index increased to 48.9 in June from a record low 44.8 in May. Joanne Hsu, director of University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers, provides background on the numbers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Half of Hormuz Stoppages Restored, US Energy Chief Says
title_cn: 美国能源部长称霍尔木兹海峡一半停工已恢复
summary: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright said roughly 7 million barrels of daily oil and fuel shipments are flowing through the Strait of Hormuz, or about half of the volumes stranded at the start of the Iran war. Wright spoke Friday with Annmarie Hordern during the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing in Houston.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Bottom Hunters Are Eyeing Up AI Frenzy and SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 比特币探底者关注人工智能狂热和 SpaceX IPO
summary: Bitcoin’s rebound this week from the depths of despair below $60,000 has reignited a familiar Wall Street ritual: trying to call the bottom.

title: New York is in the Money With Knicks’ Historic Run
title_cn: 尼克斯队历史性的表现让纽约陷入了金钱困境
summary:
The vibes in New York City are very, very good this week with the historic 29-point comeback in Game 4 of the NBA Finals.

Bloomberg's Randall Williams joins Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith on the Everybody's Business podcast to unpack the NBA frenzy overtaking New York and the economic impact the Knicks' historic run has on the city. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Middle East Fuel Exports Rebound as Tankers Slip Through Hormuz
title_cn: 随着油轮驶过霍尔木兹海峡，中东燃料出口反弹
summary: Exports of refined fuels from the Persian Gulf have rebounded this month as more tankers managed to slip through the Strait or Hormuz, providing welcome relief to markets starved of supply.

title: Sleep Number Files Bankruptcy to Sell Itself, Blames Tariffs
title_cn: Sleep Number 申请破产出售自己，指责关税
summary: Mattress maker Sleep Number Corp. filed bankruptcy with an agreement to sell the firm to one-time retail partner Sleep Country Canada Inc. after years of weak demand, mounting financial pressure and unpredictable tariffs.

title: Uber Weighs Delivery Hero Asset Sales to Smooth Full Takeover
title_cn: Uber 考虑出售配送英雄资产以顺利完成全面收购
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is reaching out to parties interested in Delivery Hero SE’s regional businesses as it works toward a takeover of the German food delivery company that would get regulatory approval, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Citi’s Kaiser Sees Capital Demand Pressuring Markets
title_cn: 花旗凯撒认为资本需求给市场带来压力
summary: Stuart Kaiser, head of equity trading strategy at Citi, sees some market friction amid a “broad-based demand for capital” across initial public offerings, secondary stock sales and bonds markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Kazimir Says Rates Must Be Lifted More to Tackle Inflation
title_cn: 欧洲央行卡济米尔表示必须进一步提高利率以应对通胀
summary: Inflation spreading through the economy will force the European Central Bank to raise interest rates further, according to Governing Council member Peter Kazimir.

title: Putin Vows to Expand Starlink Rival With Aim to Step Up Attacks
title_cn: 普京誓言扩大星链竞争对手，旨在加强攻击
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin said his country is expanding a constellation of domestically produced satellites as he vowed to step up strikes on Ukrainian infrastructure.

title: The Four Biggest Issues Facing the Music Industry Right Now
title_cn: 当前音乐产业面临的四大问题
summary: From AI to fraud to AI-powered fraud, the music business has some concerns

title: Elon Musk Is the World's First Trillionaire
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克是世界上第一位亿万富翁
summary: It's official: The world has its first trillionaire. At $150 a share, Elon Musk’s net worth is roughly $1.05 trillion. SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq Friday morning. Caroline Hyde, Ed Ludlow and Alexandra Merz, a Tesla investor, discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Begins Trading on the Nasdaq After Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在创纪录的首次公开募股后开始在纳斯达克交易
summary: SpaceX is now trading. The stock sold for $150 in its opening trade on Nasdaq at 11:46 a.m. in New York, 11% above its $135 offering price, and climbed as high as $168.75 in the first few minutes. Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Isn’t in the S&P 500. That's Good.
title_cn: SpaceX 不在标准普尔 500 指数中。这很好。
summary: The S&P 500 shouldn’t make exceptions for big tech companies like SpaceX, Anthropic or OpenAI. Keeping its criteria for admission is more important, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Nir Kaissar. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk Talks SpaceX, Future, and History on IPO Day
title_cn: 伊隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在 IPO 日谈论 SpaceX、未来和历史
summary: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday, with a livestream event where he addressed SpaceX employees. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk Rings Nasdaq Opening Bell Before SpaceX Begins Trading
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克在 SpaceX 开始交易前敲响纳斯达克开盘钟
summary: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday morning before his company began trading. The rocket company made history with a $75 billion IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Duke's Harvey on Why SpaceX’s IPO Could Distort Passive Flows
title_cn: 杜克大学的哈维谈为什么 SpaceX 的 IPO 可能会扭曲被动流动
summary:
Shares of SpaceX appear ready to jump when they start trading on Friday after Elon Musk’s company made history with a $75 billion IPO that instantly turned it into one of the biggest public companies in the world. Early indications of buying interest on Nasdaq pointed to a roughly 30% jump from the shares’ offering price of $135. The stock is expected to officially start trading later Friday under the ticker SPCX.

Campbell Harvey, Professor of Finance at Duke University's Fuqua School of Business, breaks down why the SpaceX IPO could expose major flaws in index construction, passive fund buying and market structure, with a tiny float and accelerated benchmark inclusion set to intensify demand. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adobe’s CFO Departs While Company Also Searches for New CEO
title_cn: Adobe 首席财务官离职，同时公司也在寻找新首席执行官
summary: Adobe Inc. shares fell by the most in 15 months after the company said its chief financial officer would depart, leaving a leadership vacuum following Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen  announced his resignation earlier this year.

title: SpaceX Should Triple Revenue in Two Years, Kennedy Says
title_cn: 肯尼迪称 SpaceX 收入应在两年内增加两倍
summary: Matt Kennedy, Senior IPO Market Strategist at Renaissance Capital, expects SpaceX to more than triple revenue in the next two years. He speaks before SpaceX begins trading for the first time on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Stock Traders Can Expect From SpaceX’s Trading Debut
title_cn: 股票交易员对 SpaceX 首次交易有何期待
summary: Investors will soon have a sense of how SpaceX shares will perform after the largest initial public offering ever — but they may need to wait several hours to get in on the trading action.

title: Air India Crash Report Delayed as Investigation Continues
title_cn: 由于调查仍在继续，印度航空坠机报告被推迟
summary: The final report about why an Air India Ltd. jetliner crashed last year won’t be issued by Friday’s mandatory deadline, with a government agency saying the investigation into the country’s worst commercial airline disaster still isn’t finished.

title: Chinese Chipmaker MetaX Plans Hong Kong Listing to Seize on Boom
title_cn: 中国芯片制造商MetaX计划在香港上市以抓住繁荣
summary: MetaX Integrated Circuits Shanghai Co. plans to list shares in Hong Kong to capture the boom in chip stocks after a blockbuster initial public offering in mainland China last year.

title: France’s Mistral in Funding Talks at About €20 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 法国 Mistral 正在进行融资谈判，估值约为 200 亿欧元
summary: French startup Mistral AI is in talks to raise around €3 billion ($3.5 billion) at a valuation of roughly €20 billion, according to people familiar with the discussions, providing Europe’s artificial intelligence champion with a cash injection as it competes in a costly computing race against competitors in the US and China.

title: Taiwan Eyes $200 Million Data Center for Lone South America Ally
title_cn: 台湾斥资2亿美元为南美唯一盟友建立数据中心
summary: Taiwan plans to help bring a $200 million data center to Paraguay, its lone ally in South America, in a rare investment aimed at shoring up the two partners’ diplomatic relationship that’s backed by Washington.

title: SpaceX and Tesla Will Likely Merge, Ives Says
title_cn: 艾夫斯表示 SpaceX 和特斯拉可能会合并
summary: SpaceX has made history with the largest IPO ever, pricing shares at $135 each and raising $75 billion. Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, discussed the overwhelming demand for the offering, how this is a bet on Elon Musk and the possibility of Tesla and SpaceX merging. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Gets a $165 Price Target From New Street’s Ferragu
title_cn: New Street 的 Ferragu 给 SpaceX 设定了 165 美元的目标价
summary: Pierre Ferragu managing director at New Street Research, discusses the record-breaking SpaceX IPO, his growth and capex expectations for the company moving forward, and the “Musk premium” factored into its valuation.  (Corrects spelling of analyst’s firm in headline.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Shares Extend Gain to 30% in Trading Debut
title_cn: SpaceX 首次交易股价涨幅扩大至 30%
summary: Elon Musk on screen in Times Square during the company's IPO at the Nasdaq MarketSite in New York on June 12.

title: Swiss Economy Depends on Foreign Workers: Economiesuisse
title_cn: 瑞士经济依赖外国工人：Economiesuisse
summary: If Switzerland votes to cap the population at 10 million inhabitants, this could severely impact labor-intensive sectors like restaurants, construction, and healthcare, as well as innovative sectors like scientific research and product development, all of which depend 'heavily' on foreign workers, says Rudolf Minsch, Chief Economist at Swiss business sector umbrella organization Economiesuisse. He spoke on 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua' on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Latest AI Doomers Imagine How Europe ‘Slides Into Irrelevance’
title_cn: 最新的人工智能毁灭者想象欧洲如何“滑向无足轻重”
summary: Report urges ‘most ambitious’ effort to keep pace in the AI race

title: When Will the UK Have Its First £100 Billion Tech Firm?
title_cn: 英国何时会拥有第一家价值 1000 亿英镑的科技公司？
summary: James Wise, general partner at Balderton Capital, says the UK could soon have its first £100 billion tech company. Wise, who also serves as chair of the UK Government's Sovereign AI fund, says policymakers must work with investors to help British firms scale globally. He speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie at London Tech Week. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Next US-China AI Battle Is Over Compute — and China Is Spending Big
title_cn: 中美下一场人工智能之战将围绕计算展开——中国正在投入巨资
summary: China bets $295 billion on AI backbone as US data center boom accelerates

title: Singapore Court Stays Order to Jail Byju’s Founder, Lawyer Says
title_cn: 律师称，新加坡法院暂缓监禁 Byju 创始人
summary: Singapore’s high court has granted a stay on a six-month jail term for the founder of failed Indian technology firm Byju’s, his law firm Lazareff Le Bars said.

title: Do Humanoid Robots Really Need Legs?
title_cn: 人形机器人真的需要腿吗？
summary: There’s a long-running disagreement among roboticists about whether wheeled robots make more sense than walking ones.

title: US, Iran Edge Toward Interim Peace Deal to Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国与伊朗有望达成重新开放霍尔木兹的临时和平协议
summary: The US and Iran moved closer to an interim peace agreement meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and help end a war that has damaged the global economy and caused chaos in the Middle East, but conflicting messages from both sides have caused lingering uncertainty.

title: South Africa’s Ramaphosa Seeks to Halt Impeachment Proceedings
title_cn: 南非拉马福萨寻求停止弹劾程序
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa asked the High Court to halt a parliamentary inquiry into whether he should be impeached over his handling of a robbery at his wildlife ranch.

title: Starmer Vows to Fight On After Defense Chief’s Resignation
title_cn: 斯塔默誓言在国防部长辞职后继续战斗
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer pledged not to step down over a dispute with of his former defense chief, signaling that he would try to hold onto the job through a key election next week.

title: UN Atomic Watchdog Will Prioritize Iran as Potential Deal Looms
title_cn: 随着潜在协议的临近，联合国原子监督机构将优先考虑伊朗
summary: The United Nations atomic watchdog will make verifying the full scope of Tehran’s nuclear capabilities its top priority, as Iran and the US edge toward a possible agreement to end the war in the Middle East, according to the organization’s chief.

title: Romanian Premier Nominee’s Prospects Dim After Second Party Snub
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总理候选人在第二党冷落后前景黯淡
summary: Romanian prime minister nominee Eugen Tomac failed to secure the endorsement of a second pro-European party, clouding his election prospects in the country’s fractious parliament.

title: Judge Rejects DOJ Assurance ‘Weaponization’ Fund Is Defunct
title_cn: 法官拒绝司法部保证“武器化”基金已失效
summary: A federal judge in Virginia will allow a lawsuit to proceed challenging the Trump administration’s plans for a $1.8 billion fund for alleged victims of political “weaponization,” despite assurances from US officials that the plan won’t move forward.

title: India Summons US Diplomat for Second Time Over Gulf Strikes
title_cn: 印度因海湾袭击第二次传唤美国外交官
summary: India’s government summoned a senior US diplomat for a second time this week to protest US strikes on vessels carrying Indian crew members in the Gulf of Oman.

title: Rhode Island Joins Tax-the-Rich Push With New Millionaire Levy
title_cn: 罗德岛州加入新的百万富翁征税计划
summary: Rhode Island joined the growing ranks of states with a millionaire tax, moving to shore up its budget in spite of warnings that the departure of even a few wealthy residents would hurt the nation’s smallest state.

title: US-Iran Deal Slowed by Web of Go-Betweens Facilitating Talks
title_cn: 美伊协议因中间人促进谈判而放缓
summary:
President Trump has repeatedly said the US and Iran are on the cusp of a deal to end their conflict. The reality has proved more elusive — in part because of the nature of the negotiations themselves.

The latest confusion came as Trump claimed a deal was imminent on Thursday, saying an agreement could be signed as early as this weekend. By Friday, the president was posting on social media that “there is no such thing as dealing in good faith” with Tehran.

We get analysis from Harrison Mann, former US Army Major and Middle East Intelligence Analyst & Associate Director for Win Without War. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Deal Slowed by Web of Go-Betweens Facilitating Talks
title_cn: 美伊协议因中间人促进谈判而放缓
summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said the US and Iran are on the cusp of a deal to end their conflict. The reality has proved more elusive — in part because of the nature of the negotiations themselves.

title: Kazakh Ruling Party Offers Merger With New Pro-President Group
title_cn: 哈萨克斯坦执政党提议与新的亲总统集团合并
summary: Kazakhstan’s ruling Amanat party proposed to merge with a newly-formed grouping as President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev continues to remodel the political system in Central Asia’s largest oil producer.

title: US Ships Escort Oil Tankers Through Hormuz at Night, Burgum Says
title_cn: 布尔古姆称，美国船只夜间护送油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: US forces are helping move millions of barrels through the Strait of Hormuz under the cover of darkness, sometimes escorting more than 20 ships per night out of the vital waterway, US Interior Secretary Doug Burgum said Friday.

title: Chile Seeks Venezuela Diplomatic Reset to Advance Migration Plans
title_cn: 智利寻求委内瑞拉外交重置以推进移民计划
summary: Chile’s foreign affairs minister is eager to resume full diplomatic relations with Venezuela before the government’s term ends in 2030 to facilitate the return of tens of thousands of undocumented immigrants. The ball is now in Venezuela’s court, he said.

title: UK Defense Chief Warns of ‘Challenges’ Amid Spending Fight
title_cn: 英国国防部长警告支出斗争中的“挑战”
summary: The UK’s new defense secretary, Dan Jarvis, warned industry and military leaders there are “significant challenges ahead” a day after his predecessor quit in a clash with the Treasury over spending.

title: Musk, Trump Relationship More Professional | The Debrief
title_cn: 马斯克与特朗普关系更专业 |汇报
summary: On this week’s "The Debrief with Mario Parker," Mario breaks down how the relationship between President Donald Trump and Elon Musk has evolved. Earlier this month Trump said Musk is “a friend of mine again.” Mario also talks about how some members of the Trump administration stand to gain financially from the SpaceX IPO. He reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Merz’s Healthcare Overhaul Faces Resistance in German States
title_cn: 梅尔茨的医疗改革在德国各州面临阻力
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s landmark overhaul of Germany’s healthcare system, a central element of a broader package of promised reforms, is facing resistance by state governments over planned service cuts.

title: IMF Said to Agree on Kyiv Loan Deal Despite Missed Condition
title_cn: 尽管未能达成条件，国际货币基金组织仍同意基辅贷款协议
summary: The International Monetary Fund agreed to release its next tranche of a loan to Ukraine, despite Kyiv’s failure to meet a key condition as the war-weary nation faces a growing backlash against the requirements.

title: Morocco Weighs China Free-Trade Agreement, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示摩洛哥正在考虑与中国自由贸易协定
summary: China asked Morocco to sign a free trade agreement, the North African nation’s industry minister said, as Rabat weighs whether closer economic ties with Beijing would benefit its export-oriented manufacturing sector.

title: India Shifts Into Crisis Mode With Fuel Curbs, Wider Deficit
title_cn: 印度因燃料限制和赤字扩大而进入危机模式
summary: India is ramping up its economic defenses as the war in Iran drives up energy costs, prompting authorities to ration diesel, weigh spending cuts and hunt for overseas capital.

title: Africa CDC Says Congo Ebola Outbreak’s True Scale Unknown
title_cn: 非洲疾病预防控制中心称刚果埃博拉疫情的真实规模未知
summary: Africa CDC says authorities are unable to determine the true extent of the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo because emergency workers can’t find all the missing contacts of patients infected by the virus.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Flexes Status as Major Cultural Force
title_cn: 特朗普改变了主要文化力量的地位
summary: The president is everywhere, all the time like few chief executives before him

title: US, Iran Edge Toward Interim Deal Signing Close to G7 Next Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗有望在下周七国集团峰会前夕签署临时协议
summary: The US and Iran may sign an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on the sidelines of the Group of Seven world leaders summit next week, according to senior officials.

title: Trump, Modi Look to Repair Ties in Shadow of New US Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普和莫迪希望在美国新一轮打击的阴影下修复关系
summary: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war.

title: NATO Winding Down Its Kosovo Mission Due to Improved Security
title_cn: 由于安全局势改善，北约结束了在科索沃的任务
summary: NATO will reduce its military presence in Kosovo, marking a shift for a peacekeeping mission that has remained a cornerstone of stability in the Balkans since the 1999 war.

title: Sweden Says Russia Could Seek to Test NATO in ‘Near Term’
title_cn: 瑞典称俄罗斯可能寻求在“近期”测试北约
summary: Sweden sees a possibility that Russia may seek to test NATO’s cohesion and its commitment to mutual defense through some kind of military attack in the “relatively near term.”

title: US and Iran Nearing a Peace Deal Around Next Week’s G7 Meeting
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在下周七国集团会议期间接近达成和平协议
summary: The US and Iran are moving closer to signing an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz that could potentially come as soon as Sunday with the Group of Seven world leaders set to meet next week. Abeer Abu Omar reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Treasury Says Upgrades Show Path to Investment Grade
title_cn: 南非财政部表示升级表明了投资级别的道路
summary: South Africa’s recent credit-rating upgrades are a strong endorsement of government policy and show the nation can restore its coveted investment-grade status if it stays on track, said the National Treasury chief.

title: Swiss Firms Expect Population Cap to Be Defanged, Lobby Says
title_cn: 游说团体称瑞士企业预计人口上限将被取消
summary: Swiss companies expect the government to water down the proposed population cap if voters back it, according to the country’s main business lobby.
